title: No Peace Among Stars
notes: Collection/anthology row present; individual contents not explicitly recoverable from TLBranson list.

curation.synopsis: Sixteen short stories from across the 41st Millennium, each cut to the rhythm of a single battlefield. Space Marines hold ridge-lines and reliquaries; Astra Militarum guardsmen and -women fight in trenches that swallow them whole; Adeptus Mechanicus skitarii probe the edges of forge worlds against rising xenos tides and the renewed thunder of Chaos. The Howling Griffons answer the Guns of Enth. Skitarius Ranger Iota-11 walks a colder kind of patrol. Across continents and crusade lines, the Imperium's three core soldier-castes go to work - and pay for every metre.

rating.reason: Released 2025-11-07; no reachable Goodreads page during research window.
